notes.content: SEPA env loading now checks Desktop/QuantDB/.env and Desktop/QuantDB/mvp_platform/.env before repo-local .env. Current QuantDB mvp_platform .env contains KIWOOM_APP_KEY/KIWOOM_SECRET_KEY but not KIWOOM_TOKEN_URL/KIWOOM_OHLCV_URL, so live OHLCV falls back to yfinance unless those endpoint vars are added.

Refresh pipeline now prefers cached local OHLCV first, then QuantDB prices, then live fetch. QuantDB mvp backup DB currently provides only 65 daily rows for 005930.KS/000660.KS/051910.KS, so it supplements but does not replace long-history live/yfinance backfill yet.

BetaChartist thresholds are now configurable via SEPA_BETA_MIN_CONFIDENCE and SEPA_BETA_MAX_CONSISTENCY, defaulting to 1.8 and 1.9 (relaxed from previous implicit 2.0/1.4). 2026-03-11 pipeline output changed from beta=0 gamma=0 delta=0 picks=0 to beta=3 gamma=3 delta=3 picks=3 while recommendations stayed at 2 due sector_leadership_ready gate.
